name: AI Revenue App Generator
description: Generates complete AI-powered applications designed for revenue from day 1. Uses real TrustMRR data to pick winning niches, builds full-stack apps with Stripe payments, and deploys with automated growth.
prompt: Generates complete AI-powered applications designed for revenue from day 1. Uses real TrustMRR data to pick winning niches, builds full-stack apps with Stripe payments, and deploys with automated growth. Focus: AI wrappers, AI-native tools, and AI-enhanced SaaS that generate MRR.
examples: Build an AI app that makes money
